REMARK:PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDERICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KOON TING IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MISSION CONSTRUCTION IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TING, KOON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION CONSTRUCTORS, INC. $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,915.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF VERSUS DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
